title: net-snmp security update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 8.
description:
[5.8-33.0.1]
- fix error index value when snmpget is used a proxy pass [Orabug: 34905643]

[1:5.8-33]
- fix out of bound access (RHEL-137501)
- perl modern auth enablement (RHEL-137310)
full_text:
[5.8-33.0.1]
- fix error index value when snmpget is used a proxy pass [Orabug: 34905643]

[1:5.8-33]
- fix out of bound access (RHEL-137501)
- perl modern auth enablement (RHEL-137310)
